name: Mahogany Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking powder, and baking soda; set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat sugars, margarine, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Beat in sour cream alternately with dry ingredients.
Pour batter into a well-greased 10-inch tube or bundt pan.
Bake for 1 hour and 25 minutes, or until tested done.
Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan. Sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired.
Serve with Quick Chocolate Sauce if desired.
Quick Chocolate Sauce:
In a heavy saucepan, melt margarine; stir in cocoa until smooth.
Stir in remaining ingredients; mix well.
Over medium heat, cook and stir until smooth and thickened, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm over cake or ice cream. Refrigerate leftovers. To reheat, place desired amount of sauce in a small heavy saucepan with a small amount of water. Over low heat, stir constantly until heated through.
